infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app uses speech recognition to understand voice commands for easier navigation.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone to listen to voice commands.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: This app needs access to location for emergency alerts.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: This app needs access to location for emergency alerts.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: This app needs access to location for emergency alerts.

plugins.photosPermission: This app needs access to your photos to share memories with family.
plugins.cameraPermission: This app needs access to your camera to take photos.
